title: cd evidence-surveillance-site
text:
This is a Quarto website.
To learn more about Quarto websites visit https://quarto.org/docs/websites.

title: References
text:
Evidence Database
This table is generated from data/references.csv.

references = FileAttachment("data/references.csv").csv({typed: true})







Inputs.table(references, {
  columns: ["Title", "Authors", "Year", "Outbreak", "Study Design", "Journal"],
  sort: "Year",
  reverse: true
})






 Download CSV

title: Methods
text:
Search the literature
Import references into DistillerSR
Screen studies for relevance
Classify evidence
Export references as a CSV
Upload the CSV to GitHub
GitHub Pages automatically publishes the updated website




This prototype evaluates whether GitHub can serve as a centralized repository for evidence surveillance materials while minimizing maintenance requirements.



This website is a proof of concept and is not intended for production use.
